lType":"uint256","name":"guessesCommit","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"proofDictRoot","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"guessesUsed","type":"uint256"}],"name":"logSolve","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"challengeId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"guessesCommit","type":"uint256"}],"name":"logged","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"challengeId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"commit","type":"uint256"}],"name":"openChallenge","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"wordleRules","outputs":[{"internalType":"contract WordleRules","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"Solved(uint256,address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"A trustless leaderboard entry: `solver` solved `challengeId` in `guessesUsed` guesses at `solvedAt`."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"challenges(uint256)":{"notice":"Challenges by id. openedAt == 0 means list)."},"logSolve(uint256,uint256[24],uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Log a solve. Verifies the wordle_solve proof against the challenge's committed word + the committed dictionary, records the guess sequence spent, and emits the leaderboard entry crediting msg.sender with `guessesUsed`."},"logged(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Anti-replay: a given guess sequence can be logged at most once per challenge."},"openChallenge(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Open a challenge with a hidden-word commitment. Permissionless \u2014 anyone can set a word for friends to solve. Stamps `openedAt` and records the setter."},"wordleRules()":{"notice":"The reused PLONK Wordle verifier wrapper (contracts/zk/WordleRules.sol) \u2014 UNCHANGED."}},"notice":"Non-wagered ZK-Wordle for playing with friends \u2014 a proof-verified record, NOT a house/casino game (that is what the retired SkillSettle was). There is no Chips, no escrow, no house, and no payout. A setter commits a hidden word and opens a challenge; friends who solve it submit a wordle_solve proof and are logged on a per-challenge leaderboard ranked by GUESSES USED (fewer = better). It reuses the EXISTING WordleRules verifier as-is: a wordle_solve proof proves the committed ordered guess sequence's first all-green position (guessesUsed, FORCED in-circuit) against the setter's committed word (`commit`) with the answer in the committed dictionary (`dictRoot`) \u2014 without revealing the word or the guesses. `commit = Poseidon(word, salt)`. Solver identity is bound at submission (msg.sender): the wordle_solve circuit does not carry a player signal, so a mempool watcher could in principle relay someone else's solve proof under their own address. For a friendly (non-wagered) game this is acceptable; binding the solver in-circuit would be a future circuit change. Each distinct guess sequence (`guessesCommit`) can be logged at most once per challenge (anti-replay).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/games/WordleLog.sol":"WordleLog"},"evmVersion":"shanghai","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":1000},"remappings":[":@ethereum-attestation-service/=node_modules/@ethereum-attestation-service/",":@openzeppelin/=node_modules/@openzeppelin/",":forge-std/=../../lib/forge-std/src/",":hardhat/=node_modules/hardhat/",":multicaller/=node_modules/multicaller/",":solady/=node_modules/solady/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/games/WordleLog.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcd807851ab8bba7afa24514d431a293ada7b449e649898a826e00fc79f86b1bf","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://949df397550c67c56bda2078a84f8f4f16c52fd3051b527032bb41db9179db08","dweb:/ipfs/QmXgS6d4dPNEdde48aTyqUtU2pAePJnewqW4GD8Ec64piH"]},"contracts/zk/WordleRules.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf708a9c96bf7687066d7b470052babeaaa739e5838f4ad22cfd6b40f0cb0cc8a","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://b95294c666b34ee004837ceb5c59130534ec4fb6290c029396529b8ae4c91151","dweb:/ipfs/QmP2f7G3o19kZ5zXHLYHKhs2btHzUiq4wHrd4zaaHrnK4K"]},"contracts/zk/generated/WordleCluePlonkVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd19e6cd3430ac196adb5689c9f2cee197aa79948979151dbe2839e6ca370b80f","license":"GPL-3.0","urls":["bzz-raw://7e01444b118965c33d332b2d70a1efee10cf7d3a83b412189869e2ecf798f3e9","dweb:/ipfs/QmawDZzUxyXa96pMvtjkma5NYgg8kw6MBVnuZx3gbyo2ay"]},"contracts/zk/generated/WordleSolvePlonkVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe2c409a70a868c7591a543219d5e5f1c1683234f9c7c05a469149ff4a0feaaeb","license":"GPL-3.0","urls":["bzz-raw://120f7619e5b47c0d6633cf0524cf7685cd4d340511a754b85a80cbbacaed2878","dweb:/ipfs/QmYVt9sYV9oc8jfi6auxDC4ocsJVfUj7gRo3VghGx5Tg59"]}},"version":1}

challenges(uint256).notice: Challenges by id. openedAt == 0 means "never opened".

dictRoot().notice: The committed dictionary root every solve proof must be against (the real word list).

logSolve(uint256,uint256[24],uint256,uin.notice: Log a solve. Verifies the wordle_solve proof against the challenge's committed word + the committed dictionary, records the guess sequence spent, and emits the leaderboard entry crediting msg.sender with `guessesUsed`.

logged(uint256,uint256).notice: Anti-replay: a given guess sequence can be logged at most once per challenge.

openChallenge(uint256,uint256).notice: Open a challenge with a hidden-word commitment. Permissionless — anyone can set a word for friends to solve. Stamps `openedAt` and records the setter.

wordleRules().notice: The reused PLONK Wordle verifier wrapper (contracts/zk/WordleRules.sol) — UNCHANGED.
